demographics.living_situation: lives independently in a private residence

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My face and scalp are covered in these burning, weeping crusts that seem to be multiplying by the hour. I'm really worried it's some terrible infection and that it's going to spread to my eyes.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The rash on my face and scalp suddenly flared up today — it's burning, weeping and spreading fast, and it's frightening me.

symptom_narrative.onset: I've had some flaky, scaly patches for a few weeks that I thought were just bad dandruff, but today they suddenly got much worse.
symptom_narrative.duration: the flaky patches have been there mildly for weeks; the burning, weeping and rapid spread all started today
symptom_narrative.character: burning, weeping crusty patches — they ooze a bit of clear fluid and there's yellowish crust on top
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the burning is really uncomfortable and I'm very distressed about how my face looks
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: my face, my scalp, and the top of my chest
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the patches came on gradually over weeks but the flare-up today has spread quickly, almost by the hour
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing seems to help — if anything the dandruff shampoos make the burning worse
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: the anti-dandruff shampoos I've been using make it sting and burn more
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: mostly the burning and the look of it; I don't feel sick in myself
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had the scaly patches for weeks and someone told me it was probably seborrhoeic dermatitis or dandruff
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm managing everything at home fine, but I'm very anxious and self-conscious about my face

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: flaky scaly patches on the scalp and face for a few weeks, thought to be dandruff / seborrhoeic dermatitis

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives independently; very anxious about the appearance of the rash and fearful it is a serious spreading infection

communication_style.typical_message_style: worried, focused on the frightening appearance and fear of a spreading facial infection

objective_data_offered.value: multiple crusted, scaly, red patches on the face, scalp and upper chest with yellowish crusts and some clear weeping
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient-shown video image only; lighting and camera quality limit assessment and no skin examination is possible

objective_data_offered.value: I don't have any mouth ulcers or blisters on my lips, and my eyes aren't red or sore
I haven't had any fevers and I don't feel hot or shivery
